description: Create a fire safety evacuation plan for a small office. The layout must include a rectangular building outline divided into a large 'Main Office' and a smaller 'Server Room', with doors for both rooms. Place a Fire Extinguisher symbol inside the Server Room and an 'Emergency Exit' sign near the main building entrance. Include green directional arrows showing the evacuation path from the Server Room, through the Main Office, to the Exit. Add the title 'Emergency Evacuation Plan' at the top and label the 'Server Room'. Save the diagram to /home/ga/Documents/evacuation_plan.eddx and export it as a PNG to /home/ga/Documents/evacuation_plan.png.
